SEARCH

Package server.dao

package server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests). DAOs own all JDBC — prepared statements, transactions, and row-to-DTO mapping — and are the only classes that talk to MySQL via DBConnection.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AuthDAO
    Data access object for authentication: staff/visitor credential lookups and the single-login lock backed by the active_session table.
    MemberDAO
    Data access object for member registration: the visitor base row plus the subscriber and guide extension rows that a SERVICE_REP creates.
    NotificationDAO
    Data access object for the notification table.
    ParameterChangeDAO
    Data access object for the parameter_change_request table — the persistence behind the park-parameter approval workflow.
    ParkDAO
    Data access object for the park table.
    ReportDAO
    Read-only data access object backing the department manager's reports.
    ReservationDAO
    Data access object for the reservation table.
    VisitDAO
    Data access object for the visit table — one row per party that physically enters a park, by reservation or as a casual walk-in.
    WaitlistDAO
    Data access object for the waiting_list_entry table.
